description: Managed database, KV, and R2 storage platform on Cloudflare Workers

mcp.description: Full platform management via Model Context Protocol — use for infrastructure setup from AI agents
mcp.auth: Bearer token via Authorization header using your platform API key (kdbp_ prefix)

sdk.description: TypeScript SDK for using Kuratchi resources at runtime in deployed applications

methods.query: db.query(sql, params?) — parameterized query, returns rows as objects
methods.batch: db.batch([{ sql, params? }]) — multiple statements in a transaction
methods.raw: db.raw(sql, params?) — returns rows as arrays
methods.drizzleProxy: db.drizzleProxy() — returns Drizzle ORM compatible proxy

methods.get: kv.get(key, type?) — get value by key
methods.getWithMetadata: kv.getWithMetadata(key, type?) — get value with metadata
methods.put: kv.put(key, value, { expirationTtl?, metadata? }) — store a value
methods.list: kv.list({ prefix?, limit?, cursor? }) — list keys

methods.get: r2.get(key) — download object (returns body stream, etag, contentType, size)
methods.put: r2.put(key, body, { contentType?, metadata? }) — upload object
methods.head: r2.head(key) — get metadata without downloading
methods.list: r2.list({ prefix?, limit?, cursor? }) — list objects

methods.tokens.createForDatabase: Create scoped DB token { name, databaseId }
methods.tokens.createForKv: Create scoped KV token { name, kvNamespaceId }
methods.tokens.createForR2: Create scoped R2 token { name, r2BucketId }

platform.scope: Full platform management — create/delete resources, manage tokens

scoped.scope: Access a single resource (database, KV namespace, or R2 bucket)
scoped.obtain: Create via API, MCP, or SDK using a platform token

ai.chat: POST /ai/chat { sessionId?, model?, message?, messages?, system?, reset? }
notes: All AI endpoints require a platform token (kdbp_ prefix)
POST /ai/chat resumes an existing session when sessionId is provided
GET /ai/sessions/:sessionId returns session metadata plus current agent state

databases.query: POST /:dbName { sql, params?, batch?, exec?, raw? }

tokens.create: POST /platform/tokens { type, name, databaseId?, kvNamespaceId?, r2BucketId? }

ai_rest_examples.create_session: fetch('https://kuratchi.cloud/api/v1/ai/sessions', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer kdbp_your_token_here' }, body: JSON.stringify({ title: 'Support chat', model: '@cf/meta/llama-3.3-70b-instruct-fp8-fast' }) })
ai_rest_examples.chat: fetch('https://kuratchi.cloud/api/v1/ai/chat', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer kdbp_your_token_here' }, body: JSON.stringify({ sessionId: 'session-id', message: 'Help me debug this stack trace' }) })
